_comment: R3 rules data overlaying existing rows in the `vehicles` table. Keyed by (category_tree, name). Columns added to the vehicles table by export_sqlite.py: cf_consumed (decimal CF), load_kg_formula (string formula evaluating against host vehicle's Body — e.g. '25', 'body*3', 'body*body*5'), mount_points (int: 1 firmpoint, 2 hardpoint, 0 non-fixed), engine_track (Speed|Acceleration|Load|null). Rows not listed here keep null for all four columns (= no capacity cost). Sources noted in the `book` field; book/page on the row itself is unchanged.
